channel.title: SSSD on keyll0ger
channel.description: Recent content in SSSD on keyll0ger

item.title: Sorcery - HTB Insane
item.description: Architecture Docker complexe (9 containers) + FreeIPA domain. Cypher Injection → WebAuthn Forgery → Kafka RCE → DNS Hijack → Phishing → Xvfb Framebuffer → Sudoers Wildcard → SSSD/IPA Privesc → Root.
